Happy BirthdayKavi 💕

Today is your day. Every bit of it belongs to you — the smiles, the love, the KitKat. 🍫

A few truths

Why you're wonderful, Kavi

🍫

Best taste in everything — especially KitKat. Four fingers or none.

✨

You light up every room without even trying.

🌹

Your heart is bold and beautiful — like your favourite colour.

🎀

You make ordinary days feel like celebrations.

💪

Stronger than you think, softer than people see.

🌸

The world is more beautiful because you're in it.

🍫 The Holy Snack

An Ode to KitKat

"Break me a piece" — the only sentence that means love. This year you deserve the whole bar, all four fingers, no sharing.

From the heart

A little letter, Kavi

Hey Kavi,

I've tried writing this a hundred times and deleted it every single time because nothing I write feels good enough for you. But here it is anyway.

You are the best thing that has ever walked into my life. I don't say that lightly. Before you, I didn't know that someone could make me smile just by texting good morning. I didn't know that one person could make everything feel okay just by being around. Now I do — because of you.

I love the way you laugh. I love how you don't even realise how beautiful you are. I love that you're mine and I get to be yours.

You deserve every good thing this world has to offer, Kavi. Every single bit of it. And on your birthday, I just want you to know that the guy writing this letter would do anything to see you smile.

I'm so proud to love you. I'm so lucky you let me.

Happy Birthday, my girl. 🌹

Yours, always and only. 💕

💍 One more thing

A question for you, Kavi…

"You walked into my life and I never want you to walk out. So I have to ask you something."

🎀

👆 Tap the box to open it

Will you be my wife? 💍

Made with 🍫 & ❤️ only for Kavi — forever yours 🌹
💍

She said YES! 🎉

The best answer in the entire world, Kavi. You've made me the happiest person alive. I love you more than every KitKat bar combined. 🍫❤️💍
